message:
feat(abi): expand ABI coverage for network, process, locale, directory, and string families

Expand ABI modules to support native implementations previously delegated
to glibc call-through:

- inet_abi: network address resolution with raw syscall variants
- unistd_abi: process/execution/user/group management (execl, execle,
  execlp, execvpe, getgrouplist, initgroups, daemon, login_tty, getpass)
- resolv_abi: DNS resolver function expansions
- process_abi: exec variant routing improvements
- locale_abi: locale setup and message domain handling (bindtextdomain,
  dgettext, gettext, ngettext)
- string_abi: string operation updates
- dirent_abi: directory enumeration enhancements (alphasort)
- malloc_abi/signal_abi/stdio_abi/time_abi/wchar_abi: minor updates for
  consistency with the new native implementation routing

All ABI entrypoints follow the validate-delegate pattern through the
Transparent Safety Membrane with strict/hardened mode semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
